repo_state: behind upstream with no local commits
notes: fast-forward local pull updates HEAD, tree contents and branch status like stock Git
rebase pull replays the local commit on top of the fetched upstream and leaves branch status matching stock Git
interactive rebase pull honors a sequence editor drop and removes the dropped local change like stock Git

combination: sequence editor reword plus commit editor
notes: interactive rebase pull uses the commit editor for reworded commits and leaves tree/log/status matching stock Git

repo_state: two local commits plus remote commit
notes: interactive rebase pull stops with a rebase-merge todo, then continue completes with stock-equivalent tree, log and branch status

repo_state: two local commits plus remote commit
notes: interactive rebase pull abort restores the original HEAD and removes the rebase control directory like stock Git

repo_state: local merge commit plus remote commit
notes: rebase-merges pull preserves merge topology shape, tree contents and status like stock Git
pull.rebase config makes plain pull replay the local commit on top of upstream like stock Git
branch-specific rebase config makes plain pull replay the local commit on top of upstream like stock Git
explicit --rebase=false overrides pull.rebase config and fast-forwards the local branch like stock Git

combination: -s ours with explicit local remote and branch
repo_state: local branch diverged from side branch
notes: no-rebase pull with an explicit local repository and branch creates the stock ours-strategy merge commit tree and parent shape

combination: --no-rebase with explicit local remote and branch
repo_state: local branch diverged from side branch
notes: exit, stdout, tree names and merge parent count match in the fixture, but Zmin stderr differs from stock Git's local FETCH_HEAD report

combination: --no-rebase with explicit local remote and branch
repo_state: local branch diverged from side branch
notes: short strategy option selects the stock ours merge strategy for explicit local pull

repo_state: local branch diverged from side branch
notes: positional local repository argument resolves through FETCH_HEAD and leaves stock-equivalent merge commit side effects
